title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, MTR Foods Capital India in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!
